title: Kutty Story Tamil Lyrics Master
stanzas:
Let me sing a kutty story 
Pay attention, Listen to me
Yenna anna English u
Just Listen Bro..

Let me sing a kutty story
Pay attention, Listen to me
If you want take it or else
Venaam tension leave it baby

Life is very short nanba
Always be happy
Palavidha problems
will come and go
Konjam chill pannu maappi

Together Man..
(Let me sing a kutty story..)
No tension baby..

Speed aa pona gavanam must -u
Slow aa pona steady um must - u
Anger always misery baby
Friends aa ninna powerful maappi

Haters are gonna hate but
Ignore calmly
Negativity ellam
thalli vai baby

Focus on what you dream and
Don’t worry maappi
Positivity unna
lift pannum baby..

Life is very short nanba
Always be happy
Very many problems
will come and go
Konjam chill pannu maappi

Students…..
(Let me sing a kutty story..)

Life is very short nanba
Always be happy
Design designa
problems will come and go
Konjam chill pannu maappi
No tension baby..

Hardwork um venum
Smart work um venum
Self motivation adhu needhane

Education venum
Dedication venum
Self valuation adha panni parren

Don’t be the person
spreading hatred maappi..
Pinnadi pesuradhu romba crappy..
Always be polite and
just don’t be nasty
You be the reason
to make someone happy

Life is very short nanba
Always be happy
Palavidha problems will come and go
Konjam chill pannu maappi

One last time…
(Let me sing a kutty story..)

Life is very short nanba
Always be happy
Design designa
problems will come and go
Konjam chill pannu maappi

That was my kutty story…
How was my kutty story..
Just awesome na..
No tension baby…

seo.title: Kutty Story Tamil Lyrics Master
seo.description: Full Kutty Story songs lyrics in tamil (Let me sing a kutty ...) sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Arunraja Kamaraj, Music: Anirudh, Singer(s): Vijay.
seo.keywords: Arunraja Kamaraj, Anirudh, Vijay, Kutty Story full lyrics,  songs lyrics, Kutty Story lyrics snippets, Kutty Story WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Kutty Story lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kutty Story?

The song conveys a motivational message about staying happy and relaxed despite life's challenges.

Who is the singer of Kutty Story?

The song is sung by the popular actor and singer Vijay.

Who composed the music for Kutty Story?

The music was composed by the talented Anirudh.

When was Kutty Story released?

The song was released on February 20, 2020.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kutty Story is a lively and motivational song from the movie Master, featuring the dynamic vocals of Vijay. The lyrics, penned by Arunraja Kamaraj, encourage listeners to stay happy and not stress over life's problems. Anirudh's energetic composition adds a vibrant touch, making it a perfect anthem for positivity and celebration. The song's upbeat nature and catchy tune make it ideal for parties and workouts, spreading joy and motivation.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Kutty Story from the movie Master, where Anirudh's catchy beats meet Vijay's charismatic vocals. This song is a delightful blend of motivation and happiness, perfect for lifting your spirits. Dive into the world of Kutty Story and let its upbeat rhythm guide you through life's challenges.
stanzaMeanings: Let me sing a short story. Pay attention, listen to me. What, brother? English? Just listen, bro.
Let me sing a short story. Pay attention, listen to me. If you want, take it, or else don't worry, leave it, baby.
Life is very short, friend. Always be happy. Many problems will come and go. Just chill a bit, buddy.
Together, man. (Let me sing a short story..) No tension, baby.
If you go fast, be careful. If you go slow, be steady. Anger always brings misery, baby. If you stand as friends, you're powerful, buddy.
Haters are gonna hate, but ignore them calmly. Keep negativity away, baby.
Focus on what you dream and don’t worry, buddy. Positivity will lift you up, baby.
Life is very short, friend. Always be happy. Very many problems will come and go. Just chill a bit, buddy.
Students….. (Let me sing a short story..)
Life is very short, friend. Always be happy. Different kinds of problems will come and go. Just chill a bit, buddy. No tension, baby.
Hard work is needed. Smart work is needed. Self-motivation, that's you.
Education is needed. Dedication is needed. Do self-valuation and see.
Don’t be the person spreading hatred, buddy. Talking behind is very bad. Always be polite and just don’t be nasty. You be the reason to make someone happy.
Life is very short, friend. Always be happy. Many problems will come and go. Just chill a bit, buddy.
One last time… (Let me sing a short story..)
Life is very short, friend. Always be happy. Different kinds of problems will come and go. Just chill a bit, buddy.
That was my short story… How was my short story? Just awesome, right? No tension, baby.
